initial_program:
row_has_nz(R) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
col_has_nz(C) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

minRow = #min{R : row_has_nz(R)} :- row_has_nz(R), row_has_nz(minRow).
maxRow = #max{R : row_has_nz(R)} :- row_has_nz(R), row_has_nz(maxRow).
minCol = #min{C : col_has_nz(C)} :- col_has_nz(C), col_has_nz(minCol).
maxCol = #max{C : col_has_nz(C)} :- col_has_nz(C), col_has_nz(maxCol).

maxRMinusMinR = maxRow - minRow.
maxCMinusMinC = maxCol - minCol.

output(R_out, C_out, Color) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0.

hasAny(R_out, C_out) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0.

output(R_out, C_out, 0) :- R_out >= 0, R_out <= maxRMinusMinR, C_out >= 0, C_out <= maxCMinusMinC, not hasAny(R_out, C_out).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
row_has_nz(R) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
col_has_nz(C) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

minRow = #min{R : row_has_nz(R)} :- row_has_nz(R), row_has_nz(minRow).
maxRow = #max{R : row_has_nz(R)} :- row_has_nz(R), row_has_nz(maxRow).
minCol = #min{C : col_has_nz(C)} :- col_has_nz(C), col_has_nz(minCol).
maxCol = #max{C : col_has_nz(C)} :- col_has_nz(C), col_has_nz(maxCol).

maxRMinusMinR = maxRow - minRow.
maxCMinusMinC = maxCol - minCol.

output(R_out, C_out, Color) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0.

hasAny(R_out, C_out) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0.

coord(R_out, C_out) :- R_out >= 0, R_out <= maxRMinusMinR, C_out >= 0, C_out <= maxCMinusMinC.
output(R_out, C_out, 0) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0, coord(R_out, C_out), not hasAny(R_out, C_out).

#show output/3.

final_program:
row_has_nz(R) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
col_has_nz(C) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0.

minRow = #min{R : row_has_nz(R)} :- row_has_nz(R), row_has_nz(minRow).
maxRow = #max{R : row_has_nz(R)} :- row_has_nz(R), row_has_nz(maxRow).
minCol = #min{C : col_has_nz(C)} :- col_has_nz(C), col_has_nz(minCol).
maxCol = #max{C : col_has_nz(C)} :- col_has_nz(C), col_has_nz(maxCol).

maxRMinusMinR = maxRow - minRow.
maxCMinusMinC = maxCol - minCol.

output(R_out, C_out, Color) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0.

hasAny(R_out, C_out) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0.

coord(R_out, C_out) :- R_out >= 0, R_out <= maxRMinusMinR, C_out >= 0, C_out <= maxCMinusMinC.
output(R_out, C_out, 0) :- input(R_out + minRow, C_out + minCol, Color), Color != 0, coord(R_out, C_out), not hasAny(R_out, C_out).

#show output/3.
